note: v5: DC=N/A for baseline; no structural penalty correction needed. Fair-comparison lift is the natural primary metric.

pre5_lift_comparison.description: Method A: average of per-case fair_comparison_mean values (each case mean computed over its non-null applicable dimensions). Method B: per-dimension means averaged across applicable cases, then averaged across dims. Flagged if divergence > 0.05 (PRE-5 requirement).

raw_lift.note: Raw means include debate-only dimensions (DC, ETD) where applicable per condition. DC and ETD are N/A for baseline, so raw baseline mean reflects IDR/IDP/DRQ/FVC only.
